description: Product Description Would You Know That? – Card Game Edition for Families, Friends & Party Nights! Would You Know That? – Card Game Edition Turn any gathering into an unforgettable experience with Would You Know That? , the ultimate quiz card game for families, friends, and trivia fans. Packed with 500 questions across a wide range of categories and difficulty levels, this game guarantees hours of fun and friendly competition. Would You Know That? – Card Game Edition Turn any gathering into an unforgettable experience with W ould You Know That?, the ultimate quiz card game for families, friends, and trivia fans. Packed with 500 questions across a wide range of categories and difficulty levels, this game guarantees hours of fun and friendly competition. Perfect for family nights, parties, Christmas celebrations, or even office events, this portable version is easy to learn and quick to set up – no board required! Just pick a card, answer the question, and score points. Suitable for teens, adults, and families, Would You Know That? is more than a game – it’s an opportunity to bond, laugh, and create lasting memories. Looking for a unique gift? This card game is ideal for birthdays, Secret Santa, and anyone who loves a good challenge. Would You Know That? The Quiz Game - Specifications Age Range 12+ No. of Players 2+ Material Premium Cardstock and Board No of Questions 500
